title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Alpha FX Europe Limited
body: "Application number 5120  Applicant Alpha FX Limited objected to the name used by Alpha FX Europe Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 15 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Alpha FX Europe Limited is changed to NI717027, LTD. "
